title: Isolation of Bone Marrow-Derived Macrophages from Mice
author: Not specified
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gcqbsvw

steps.title: Put 2 mL media per well...
steps.instruction: Put 2 mL media per well in 6-wells plate (1 well per 2 marrows or per animal)

steps.title: Clean femur as much as possible...
steps.instruction: Clean femur as much as possible in a petri with a little bit of phenol red free media or PBS (the most important part is the middle)

steps.title: Cut off both ends of the...
steps.instruction: Cut off both ends of the femur to expose the marrow

steps.title: Fill syringe up with the 2ml...
steps.instruction: Fill syringe up with the 2ml of media, insert into marrow and flush into the 6 well plate until the bone is clean (goes from pink to white).

steps.title: Pass the media through the syringe...
steps.instruction: Pass the media through the syringe 1-2 times (Start with 20G, then 26G)

steps.title: Transfer the cells to a 50 ml tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the cells to a 50 ml tube

steps.title: Prepare RBC lysis solution (proportions in...
steps.instruction: Prepare RBC lysis solution (proportions in cell culture cabinet) – Or purchase from Sigma

steps.title: Place on ice for 10min excatly
steps.instruction: Place on ice for 10min excatly.10.Centrifuge for 10min at 4°C 400g (~RCF, or 1200 rpm)

steps.title: Add 5ml CSF and 12ml of...
steps.instruction: Add 5ml CSF and 12ml of RPMI Medium (total volume is 15 ml) – Do not let cells dry, add medium immediately. (Or 9ml RMPI medium and 3ml CSF)

steps.title: Transfer the 15 mL cell suspension...
steps.instruction: Transfer the 15 mL cell suspension to a 100 mm polystyrene tissue culture petris (PrimariaTM, Becton Dickinson Labware) for 24 hrs

steps.title: Transfer non-adherent cells after 24 hrs...
steps.instruction: Transfer non-adherent cells after 24 hrs to fresh polystyrene petris or non adherent flasks (Green - Fisher). Cultures are grown for 6 days with 15% (v/v) L-929 cell-conditioned medium as a source of M-CSF. Add fresh CSF every 3 days. (15% of 15ml – (about 3ml)a.The batch made by Kyoko and Rabi ais at 30% , so use 5ml.

steps.title: After 6 days, collect the cell...
steps.instruction: After 6 days, collect the cell with a policeman (cell scraper 25 cm, Sarstedt #83,1830).Centrifuged for 10min 400 x g. Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 2ml of RPMI 10%FBS without Pen/Strep Phenol free for LDH. Flush media through 25, 27, and 30 G needles to separate aggregates.

steps.title: Count cells to final concentration of 1 x 106 cells/ml
steps.instruction: Count cells to final concentration of 1 x 106 cells/ml. To count cells, dilute 1/5 in Turks. Aliquot 500 µL (5x105 cellules) per well in 24-wells plate, 100ul for 96 well plate.
